His development from a young boy entranced by stories to a Naugther and Joker traveling from realm to realm in search of enchanting lore is nothing but extraordinary. His motive is simple, to preserve the rich culture of every race, from elves to orcs, and to ensure their magic is not lost in the sands of time. His romantic life, in stark contrast to his jovial persona, carries a somber undertone. A stolen kiss under a waxy moon, a heartfelt confession beside a roaring fire, and the lingering scent of wildflowers weaving a tale of love, heartbreak, and longing. A Dworf maiden, whose radiant eyes mirrored his adventurous spirit, dominates his heart's narrative, a tale he seldom shares. His nicknames, "The Laughing Lore Keeper", "The Chuckling Chronicle Carrier," and most renowned, "The Grinning Troubadour," reflect his unique blend of humor, wisdom, and storytelling prowess. A naturally gifted joker, Swisger can turn even the darkest of situations into a hearty laugh, a trait that further endears him to his interlocutors. Despite his cheery disposition and exhilarated spirit, Swisger harbors a profound desire. The wish to hear his beloved’s merry voice once again, to shower her in the myriad tales he's gathered, and to share a life woven by a heady mixture of love and adventure. Yet, he is haunted by regret; the regret of not bargaining with fate the day she disappeared into the oblivion. His only disability, if it can be constituted as such, is an acute sensitivity to sunlight that leaves him squinting. But just like every other hurdle in his life, he greets this peculiarity with his trademark grin. Equipped with an oversized hat and a pair of comical, tinted spectacles, he turns his limitation into just another chapter in his ever-expanding book of life. Swisger, the roving joker, and collector of tales, personifies the spirit of wanderlust and the power of storytelling. He reminds us that every encounter is a tale, every setback is a lesson, and every smile is the ultimate victory – a testimony to the wonderful existence that blends the mundane with the magical.

name: Desegon
bio: Desegon is a male beastman with four large horns on his head. He was born to a family of renowned churchmen, but his family's influence doesn't determine his life. He chooses to become a spy, working in the shadows to keep his country safe. Desegon's family has a famous ancestor who was a legendary churchman, known for his unyielding faith and remarkable achievements. He admires his great-grandfather's legacy and wants to live up to his name. As a child, Desegon was curious and adventurous. He loved exploring the nearby forest and playing with his friends. He was also fascinated by the church and often asked his parents about their work. During his youth, Desegon became more serious and disciplined. He started training to become a spy, learning to blend in with his environment and gather information without being detected. He also studied the art of combat and mastered various weapons. Desegon's work motive is to protect his country from outside threats. He believes that his skills are best used in the shadows, where he can gather intel and take down enemies without being seen. He is loyal to his superiors and will do whatever it takes to complete his mission. Desegon's best friend is a fellow spy named Kael. They have worked together for years and have formed a strong bond. Kael is the only person who truly understands Desegon and vice versa. Desegon's allies are his fellow churchmen, who provide him with the cover he needs to carry out his missions. He also has connections to several important figures in his country, whom he can call upon for assistance. Desegon's greatest enemy is a rival spy from a neighboring country. They have clashed numerous times, each trying to outsmart the other. Desegon has yet to defeat his rival, but he is determined to do so. Desegon is not married and does not have any siblings. He has never been interested in starting a family, as it would be too dangerous for his line of work. Desegon's biggest fear is failing his country. He knows that the stakes are high, and one mistake could mean the difference between life and death for his people. Desegon's life credo is "Trust in the shadows, but never in the light." He believes that the truth is often hidden from plain sight and that the best way to find it is by staying hidden. Politically, Desegon is neutral. He works for his country's government, but he doesn't align himself with any particular party or ideology. He simply wants to do what's best for his people, regardless of who is in charge. Desegon's biggest adventure was a mission to steal secret plans from a rival country. He and Kael had to sneak into a heavily guarded fortress and break into a secret vault. They succeeded, but barely made it out alive. Desegon's biggest flaw is his tendency to take risks. He often puts himself in danger to get the job done, even when there is a safer option. This has caused him trouble in the past, but he refuses to change his ways. Desegon's talent is his ability to blend in with his surroundings. He is able to become almost invisible, using his surroundings to hide from his enemies. Desegon has never committed a crime, as his work is technically legal. However, he has done some morally questionable things in the name of his job. Desegon's weapon of choice is a pair of daggers, which he is incredibly skilled in using. He also knows how to wield a sword and a bow. Desegon's famous quote is "The shadows hold both secrets and danger. I am the one who treads them both." This sums up his life and his job perfectly. Desegon's story is a tangled one, filled with danger and intrigue. He has faced many challenges in his life, but he has always come out on top. Desegon wears a special amulet that his great-grandfather gave him. It is said to have protected the churchman during his legendary feats, and Desegon believes it brings him luck.

name: Ponury Legwan
bio: The tall, lean lizardman known only as Ponury Legwan cuts a tragically forlorn figure as the star attraction of Barvick's Traveling Carnival of Curiosities. His dull, olive-green scales glistens in the sunlight. Legwan's pupil-less orange eyes convey a soul-weary sadness that seems disturbingly at odds with his fearsome reptilian appearance. For as long as the lizardman can recall, the roving carnival has been his permanent home and prison. He has no memories from before being a captive – he knows only the cruel beatings, scanty meals and forced humiliations of being trotted out to gawk at like a freak of nature. His name itself, "Ponury Legwan," is a derisive mockery in the Common Tongue meaning just "Gloomy Lizard." Ponury's dim recollections hint that he may have origins among the reclusive lizardfolk tribes dwelling in the fabled Desert of Dread, over a thousand leagues away. However, years of conditioning under the cruel whip of showman Barvick have beaten any certainty of his heritage out of the downtrodden being's mind. He doesn't even known his birth name or language - just that his scaled, bipedal form marks him as highly abnormal to the human crowds who recoil in shock and horror at his unveilings. Each whistle stop on the carnival's eternal journey brings more torment for the wretched lizardman. Barvick's rambling shows brimming with filthy obscenities, off-color jests and shocking freak-show exhibitions have cemented his reputation as a master showman. And no attraction draws more gasps and cheldbird screams than trotting out the bizarre, unhappy Ponury as the main event. Stripped near vicinity naked, Ponury is paraded about on a spiked leash and encouraged to screech and thrash with undignified ferocity while Barvick mocks and baits him mercilessly. Gaggles of human children find perverse delight in throwing rotten fruits and taunts at the dispirited lizardman. Yet he stoically endures it all - his only reprieve from torment coming when the carnival packs up until the next town. Occasionally, Legwan allows himself to envision another life in the harsh alien deserts of his lizardfolk kin. Yet the lizardman knows such dreams are hopelessly naive. For he has been so systematically stripped of identity, pride and spirit that he doubts any desert tribe would even recognize the broken, hollow creature before them as one of their own. So Legwan resigns himself to his perpetual role as an outcast, on display as the grotesque freak and circus minion, forever.

name: Foktas Gudrak
bio: Foktas Gudrak was born in a wealthy family in the distant city of Llanot in the Kingdom of Roven. His parents, Percival and Saskia Gudrak, were both merchants in the city and made sure that their son was well educated from a young age. Foktas was an eager student, quick to learn and eager to explore the world beyond Llanot's walls. In his early adulthood, Foktas left the city and became an itinerant trader. He traveled far and wide, trading goods between distant cities and learning about their cultures. Foktas developed a reputation as an honest and reliable trader and earned the respect of many of the people he encountered. As Foktas continued to travel, he began to focus his trading on rare and exotic items. He developed contacts in many different places, and eventually was able to establish a network of merchants that would trade with him. Gradually, he built up a collection of rare and powerful artifacts, many of which held great power and special properties. Foktas currently makes his living as a wandering merchant, selling his wares at markets and fairs throughout the kingdom. He is motivated by a desire for knowledge and a curiosity about the world around him. He is willing to take risks in order to acquire rare and powerful items, but he also exercises extreme caution when dealing with these items. Despite his friendly demeanor and good nature, Foktas has many enemies. His success is viewed with envy and suspicion by others, and he has been targeted by criminals and unscrupulous people seeking to steal his merchandise. Foktas wears a medallion around his neck, a symbol of his travels and of his commitment to the pursuit of knowledge. He keeps many secrets of the places he has visited, and his medallion serves as a reminder that he must keep these secrets safe. He never shows the medallion to other people. Foktas has one great regret in his life – the death of his beloved Saskia. He blames himself for her death, and he still feels the pain of her loss keenly. Despite this, he carries on, determined to make the most of the life he has left.

name: Jerlando Petven
bio: Jerlando Petven was born in a small town in the mainland of the Northern Kingdoms to a half-elf father and a human mother. He was the eldest of five children and always felt different from the other kids - partly because he looked different and partly because he had a natural affinity for the magical arts. As a child, Jerlando was always drawn to the forest and spent much of his time exploring its many secrets. One day, he stumbled upon an ancient, sacred tree and was suddenly filled with a sense of power and purpose. He knew he was meant to be a druid and decided to study magic in earnest. After completing his education, Jerlando traveled the world, learning from the most influential druids of the era. He became an accomplished druid and even founded his own school. However, Jerlando never forgot his roots and always kept a close eye on the forests of his home town. In his spare time, he also worked to protect the citizens of his town from any nefarious plots. Years later, Jerlane met a young woman named Brighid who changed his life forever. She taught him about the nature of love and compassion, and showed him that there was more to life than just magic. Now, Jerlando lives a simple life with Brighid by his side. He continues to teach and protect the people of his town, and he is always looking for ways to help others. Jerlando is a benevolent individual who believes in taking care of others. He is also known for his sharp wit and jocular manner. In the event of a conflict, Jerlando is known to use his magic and wit to outmaneuver his enemies. Jerlando is a diligent worker who always puts his friends and family first. He is also known for his mystical nature and his belief that all things are connected. Jerland believes that life is a journey, and that everything we experience - good and bad - is a step on the path to our ultimate destiny. Jerlando is known for his sharp wit and jocular manner. In the event of a conflict, Jerlando is known to use his magic and wit to outmaneuver his enemies.

name: Munkar
bio: Munkar stands as a pioneering figure in the realm of medicine, renowned for his groundbreaking work in the field of organ replacement with artificial counterparts, a breakthrough that has granted countless patients a renewed lease on life. His demeanor is characterized by a gentle and calming presence, and his extensive knowledge of medicine has solidified his reputation as a luminary in the medical community. Intricately woven into the tapestry of his life is a close affiliation with the Order of Wizards, and a deep and enduring friendship with King Argos, a connection forged during Munkar's boyhood. This enduring bond with Argos has stood the test of time, making them steadfast companions. Munkar's role as a sage is underpinned by an extensive understanding of magic, which he harmoniously combines with his surgical expertise. His journey as a healer began at a young age, as he conducted his inaugural operation by sewing an artificial wing onto a wounded bird, a testament to his innate talent and compassion. Munkar's personal life is intertwined with a remarkable love story, as he is married to Elayne, a former patient who had previously served as a professional soldier. Elayne's life was irrevocably altered when she suffered grievous injuries in battle, leaving her without arms and legs. It was Dr. Munkar who found her in this dire condition, and through his skill and determination, he transformed her into a resilient cyborg woman, strong and agile. Elayne chose to leave her military service behind and now collaborates with her husband in his noble work. The couple is blessed with two children, a son and a daughter, who reflect the legacy of compassion and healing that Munkar has cultivated. His son has inherited the mantle of wizardry and currently studies under King Argos, while his daughter follows in her father's footsteps, attending the medical academy with aspirations of becoming a healer in her own right. Munkar is characterized by a calm and collected disposition, underscored by a delightful sense of humor. He enjoys deep and meaningful connections with his family and friends, marked by his generosity and unwavering care. In harmony with his love for the natural world, Munkar finds solace and joy in spending time outdoors, connecting with the wonders of nature. His possession of a powerful amulet grants him access to special magical abilities, further enhancing his prowess. His favorite jest, "I once saw a magician do a magic trick that involved three rabbits. I didn't understand half of it, but the rabbits looked really happy," embodies his enduring sense of humor and his ability to bring smiles to the faces of those around him.

name: Thamchy
bio: Thamchy was born to a family of warriors, one of many that have crossedbreed with mammals over the years. They have a strict lifestyle, training their children since they were able to walk. As a boy, Thamchy was always keen on training, and he soon learned how to use his powerful physique and agility to achieve success in any fight. As he grew older, Thamchy became increasingly interested in the nobility and the customs of the kingdom. He longed to learn more about the people and the land that he loved, and so he decided to become a knight. He trained tirelessly, and soon became one of the most skilled fighters in the kingdom. Thamchy’s desire to help people was never stronger than when he met a young woman by the name of Jess. Jess was the daughter of a small village chief, and she was suffering from a curse that was preventing her from fulfilling her dream of becoming a great healer. Thamchy was determined to help Jess, and so he took on the challenge of breaking the curse. Together, Thamchy and Jess healed the villagers and restored their faith in the power of the divine. This newfound faith helped to restore peace to the kingdom, and it was thanks to the work of Thamchy and Jess that the kingdom was able to stand against the encroaching forces of the dark wizard. Thamchy and Jess eventually married, and they had a daughter named Kendra. Kendra later followed in her father’s footsteps and became a knight like her father. Thamchy is a proud warrior, and he has always been willing to risk everything in order to protect his loved ones. He is always optimistic, and he believes that anything is possible if you are brave enough to try. Thamchy is a loyal friend, and he will always stand by his comrades in times of need. He is also adventurous, and he loves to explore new worlds and challenge himself in new ways. Thamchy is known for his powerful Mannerism, which is characterized by his natural aggression and boldness. He is never afraid to take on any challenge, and he always put the needs of his kingdom first. In his spare time, Thamchy enjoys spending time with his family and friends. He is also a passionate musician, and he often performs his own songs in village square. Thamchy is a true champion of peace and justice, and he will always do everything in his power to protect the people he loves. He is a symbol of hope for the future, and he will never give up on his dream of making the kingdom a better place.

name: Hezick Greatbuster
bio: Hezik Greatbuster is a dwarf of small stature but large ambition. His face is punctuated by a large well-kept beard, and his long hair falls past his shoulders, adorned with small trinkets he's picked up on his travels. Born deep in the heart of the mountains, Hezik's youth was spent exploring the caves and tunnels that honeycombed the rock around his village. He was always restless, always seeking something more than the small life he was born into. As he grew older, he began to travel further afield, seeking out ancient ruins and forgotten cities in the hopes of uncovering the secrets of the past. He became known as a seeker, a traveler with an unquenchable thirst for knowledge. Currently, Hezik makes his living as a guide, leading groups through the treacherous mountain passes and into the wilds beyond. He has a small but dedicated group of allies who have come to rely on his expertise, but he is always careful to keep his own council, knowing the dangers of betrayal and the price one can pay for trusting too easily. Hezik has had unusual marital status, never marrying and never settling down in one place. His personality is one of cautious optimism, always looking for the best in any situation but always prepared for the worst. Hezik enjoys rich stews and hearty breads, but he isn't particularly picky when it comes to food. His life credo is that the past holds many secrets, but it is the present that truly matters. Despite his caution, Hezik has experienced a few betrayals over the years, mostly from people he thought he could trust. However, the most fateful event of his life occurred when he discovered the ruins of an ancient city deep in the heart of a vast desert. He spent months exploring the ruins, learning what he could about the forgotten people who had once lived there. It was during this time that he discovered his greatest flaw; his obsession with knowledge could blind him to the dangers that surrounded him. Despite this, Hezik is always polite and well-mannered, taking care to show respect to those he meets. He is a dreamer at heart, always looking for the next great adventure, the next secret to uncover.

name: Gulfim
bio: Gulfim is a female orc with a fiery temper and no shortage of cunning. Born into a family of merchants, Gulfim learned the ins and outs of trading at a young age. Her parents often used less than honest methods to make a profit, and Gulfim quickly picked up on the art of swindling. As a result of her family's business practices, Gulfim has become an expert in the art of deception. She is an accomplished liar and can spin a tale that would convince the most skeptical listener. Her skills have served her well as a merchant, where she is known to make deals that leave her customers with the short end of the stick. Gulfim has been married twice, both times to wealthy merchants whom she saw as easy targets. She used her charm and guile to gain their trust and then left them high and dry, making off with a fortune in goods and gold. She has one daughter from her second marriage, whom she loves fiercely but sees little of due to her constant travels. Gulfim has several siblings, but she doesn't maintain close relationships with any of them. She considers herself a lone wolf, preferring to operate independently rather than rely on anyone else. Despite her ruthless nature, Gulfim has a soft spot for those who have been wronged by others. She sees herself as a champion of the underdog and has been known to use her skills to exact revenge on those who have taken advantage of the weak. Gulfim's life credo is "never trust anyone but yourself." She takes pride in her ability to outwit others and has little respect for those who are easily fooled. The defining event of Gulfim's life was the discovery of a family secret. She learned that her parents had been involved in a conspiracy to defraud a wealthy merchant, and that their actions had resulted in the man's death. Gulfim was sickened by the discovery and vowed never to become like her parents. Gulfim's flaw is her pride. She often takes on more than she can handle and refuses to ask for help even when it is obvious she needs it. Her famous quote is "Lie with a smile, and the world is yours." Gulfim's secret is that she has a debilitating fear of heights. She goes to great lengths to avoid situations that would force her to confront her fear. Gulfim is a frequent traveler, often venturing to far-off lands in search of new markets and opportunities. Her symbol is a set of scales, a reminder of the importance of balance in all aspects of life. She wears an amulet in the shape of a serpent, a creature she associates with cunning and wisdom.

name: Moonbeam Piores
bio: Moonbeam Piores is a young, female druid who resides in the enchanted forest of Moonbeam. She is often called "beauty in bloom" for her playful and gentle nature. Moonbeam Pineforest was born to a wealthy and noble family on the edge of the magical forest. As a young girl, she loved spending time in the forest, exploring its secrets and marveling at the beautiful flowers and trees. She was always eager to be outside and enjoy the natural beauty around her. As she grew older, Moonbeam became fascinated by the story of the moon goddess and the mysteries of the forest. She began to believe that the forest was home to magic and mystical creatures. She also began to see herself as a kind of princess, living in a world that was separate from but just as beautiful as the one she lived in everyday. As she got older, Moonbeam began to spend more time in the forest, studying the plants and animals. She soon became very knowledgeable about the forest and its mysteries. She also began to find her true calling - she was born to be a Keeper of the forest, and she was determined to fill that role. She eventually left her home and traveled the world, studying forests and learning about the nature goddesses. She eventually returned to the forest, and began to work to protect it and its creatures. Young woman believes in the power of love and nature, and she is determined to protect both from the evil that threatens them. She is a kind and caring person, and she is always willing to help those in need. She is also a wise woman, and she knows how to balance the power of the forest with the needs of humanity. Moonbeam is a lover of nature and the creatures that live in it. She is also a determined and passionate person, and she is always ready to fight for what she believes in. She is known for her beautiful voice and her gentle nature, and she is always willing to help those in need. She now lives in the forest with her animal companions, tending to the plants and animals of the forest. Moonbeam loves to explore the forest and learn new things about nature. She is also very passionate about her work as a druid, and she takes pride in helping to protect forests from harm. Our heroine is often afraid of the dark, but she is also fearless when it comes to protecting her friends and loved ones. Her life motto is "be kind, beautiful, and fearless."

name: Machivan
bio: In the towering city of the Salvan Sultanate, the shadow of Machivan looms large. He's a man stitched together with threads of courage, beauty, and strength, a tapestry of a warrior born and bred in the crucible of adversity. His head, wrapped in a white turban, towers over most men. His deep-set green eyes reflect a warrior's spirit, turbulent and intense. Born in the frigid lands of Nachidevi, Machivan's childhood was far from ordinary. The seeds of resilience sown during his early years, bloom into the stalwart defender he is today. Orphaned at a tender age, he witnessed the brutality of war firsthand. Yet, it wasn't trauma that shaped his outlook, but survival. Machivan pressed onward refusing to bear wounds as scars, instead forging them into medals of personal strength. Machivan's education was the battlefield. Lessons in warfare took precedence over bedtime stories. His training borrows not from academic parchments but from the unforgiving grind of iron against iron. His sword became his master, his shield his kin, and the battlefield, a home away from home. Fidelity and courage are the cornerstones of his personality, now shaping his occupation as a bodyguard. He takes pride in serving Vizier Ali Pa Rocha, a powerful political figure. Amidst a sea of faces in the Sultanate, Juraz catches his attention. Juraz, his best friend, true and unfailing, navigating through life's tumultuous waves as Machivan's anchor. Once adversaries, a friendship forged in the crucible of rivalry evolved into an inseparable bond. Love, for him, unfolded in the hazel eyes of Saira. United not by ceremonies and vows but by a love as deep as the Sultanate's fabled well of Zar. Saira shares not just his bed but his passion for war arts and wisdom. Unseen by most, a sliver of fear flickers beneath his unyielding resolve. He fears not death, but a life lived as a bystander, a fear that fuels his passion and tenacity. In his mighty grip, his favorite weapon, a gargantuan poleaxe, flows like an artist's brush on a bloody canvas. To him, it's not just a weapon, but an extension of himself, standing testament to his motto - "Courage isn't the absence of fear. It's the triumph over it." His people revere him as 'The Silent Storm', a title earned and a nickname feared. His outstanding talent lies not just in his strength but his keen mind, devising strategies as effortlessly as he swings his poleaxe. Each faceted mannerism echoes the facets of his personality - resolute, astute, and compassionate. Much like a banyan tree standing tall amidst a swirling tempest, Machivan's story continues, one day at a time, one battle at a time.

name: Brift
bio: In the mystical realm of Eldoria, where creatures of all shapes and sizes dwell, there resides a remarkable goblin named Brift. With her long ears, green skin, and vibrant red hair, she stands out among her kind. But it is not just her appearance that sets her apart, for Brift possesses an insatiable hunger for knowledge and an unyielding desire to explore. She has earned the title of Sage through her tireless pursuit of wisdom and understanding. In her youth, Brift was an introverted and curious goblin. She spent hours delving into ancient tomes and poring over maps, captivated by tales of faraway lands and mythical artifacts. Her thirst for knowledge was fueled by a childhood friend, a wise old sage named Arun, who would regale her with stories of his travels. As Brift grew older, she ventured out into the great unknown, driven by a burning need to discover the world's secrets. Throughout her travels, she encountered a myriad of beings, some fierce and others benevolent. She learned their languages, their customs, and their histories, immersing herself in their worlds. Now, as a seasoned Sage and accomplished Seeker, Brift's occupation revolves around uncovering forgotten lore and lost treasures scattered across Eldoria and beyond. Her work motive is driven not by greed, but by an insatiable curiosity to unearth the past and preserve it for future generations. Amidst her solitary quest for enlightenment, Brift found an unlikely companion and best friend in Xander, a mysterious and enigmatic elf with whom she shares a deep bond. Xander's knowledge of magic and his unwavering loyalty have been invaluable to Brift, transcending their differences and forging an unbreakable friendship. Over time, Brift has even managed to turn former enemies into allies. Through diplomacy and her vast understanding of the world's diverse inhabitants, she has brokered peace treaties and mended long-standing feuds. Her ability to see beyond the surface and appreciate the potential for redemption in all beings has garnered her respect and admiration. Though deeply committed to her scholarly pursuits, Brift has also experienced blossoming romantic relationships, finding solace and love amidst her adventurous life. These relationships, however fleeting, have taught her the value of vulnerability and the strength that can be found in companionship. While Brift has managed to find love, marriage has never been a path she has chosen to walk. Her life credo revolves around embracing freedom and autonomy, allowing her to embark on daring quests without the encumbrances of a settled life. Throughout her journey, Brift has been known by many nicknames and titles. Fellow Seekers revere her as the "Sage of Secrets," while those she has aided in their times of need bestow upon her the title of "Liberator." But the name she holds most dear is "Curiosity's Vessel," a moniker that encapsulates her unquenchable thirst for knowledge and her relentless pursuit of truth. As with every extraordinary individual, Brift harbors both talents and quirks. Her immense talent lies in deciphering cryptic riddles and unlocking ancient locks that guard hidden knowledge. Yet, she also possesses a peculiar quirk – a fascination with collecting peculiar objects, from odd-shaped pebbles to shimmering leaves that whisper forgotten tales. Despite all her achievements, Brift is not without regrets. There are moments from her past where she had to make difficult choices, where bravery was required, but at a great personal cost. These memories haunt her dreams, reminding her that even a Sage is not immune to mistakes and the consequences they bring. A symbol of Brift's eternal quest for knowledge is the shimmering pendant she wears, adorned with an intricate labyrinth. It represents her unwavering determination to navigate the complexities of life and unravel the mysteries that lie in wait. Some may view Brift's unique appearance as a curse, but she embraces it as a blessing. It is a visible testament to her resilience, her unwavering spirit, and her insatiable desire to defy expectations and explore the realms beyond the mundane. And so, the story of Brift, the Wise Seeker, unfolds. A goblin who defies convention, a sage who craves knowledge above all, and a friend who embodies the virtues of loyalty and acceptance. Her journey is far from over, as she continues to traverse the vast tapestry of Eldoria, leaving no stone unturned, and continuing to write her extraordinary tale.

name: Ceithi Grumpy
bio: Ceithi Grumpy is a 30-year-old male draconid, known for his immense wisdom and sage demeanor. He comes from a line of famous ancestors, all of whom were revered for their intellect and strength. Born into this family of legendary dragons, Ceithi always felt the weight of his ancestry on his shoulders. However, he managed to carve out a distinct identity and create memories to cherish. As a child, Ceithi was fascinated by the world around him. He spent hours exploring the mountains and valleys of his homeland, marveling at its beauty. His childhood memories are full of flying through the sky alongside his father, who taught him everything he knows about the art of dragonry. Ceithi's dad was his childhood friend and the two shared an unbreakable bond. As he grew older, Ceithi threw himself into his studies, determined to live up to his legacy. He became a respected scholar in draconid circles, earning widespread recognition for his research on ancient texts and artifacts. Ceithi's later development saw him become a wide-spread referal subject in his field. Currently, he dedicates his life to traveling and teaching the next generation of dragon scholars. His work motive is to expand the knowledge and understanding of dragons, and he is always willing to share his insights with anyone willing to listen. His best friend is a fellow dragon scholar, who shares his passion for knowledge and exploration. Ceithi is not without his enemies, however. He has made some enemies in his quest for knowledge, and his work has often taken him to dangerous places. His marriage to his wife, also a scholar, produced one daughter and one son. His siblings are not as well-known as he is, but they share his intelligence and a love for their ancestry. Despite all his achievements, Ceithi believes that ignorance is the greatest enemy of all. His life credo is to never stop learning, for knowledge is the key to unlocking the mysteries of the world. Ceithi has a talent for speaking in a way that captivates his audience, and he desires to publish a book on his ancestral line one day. He has a phobia of deep water, as he knows that dragons do not perform well in subaqueous environments. One of Ceithi's famous quotes is, "Knowledge is not just power, it is the key to unlocking the secrets of the universe." His dream is to uncover the lost histories of his people, to learn the origin of his ancestry. He is also disabled in one wing, making it difficult for him to fly at great heights. His symbol is a dragon with a quill, representing his dual passions of knowledge and dragonry. Ceithi Grumpy is a dragon of extraordinary intelligence and skill, and he has dedicated his life to exploring the unknown. His legacy will undoubtedly be remembered for generations to come, and he remains a shining example of what it truly means to be a dragon.

name: Mui Num
bio: Mui Num was born on the remote continent of Eorzea to a seafaring family. They were originally from the country of Ivalice, but had been exiled for their opposition to the monarchy and settled in Eorzea a few years ago. Our heroine was fascinated by the magical mysteries of Eorzea from an early age, and decided to become a mage. She was taught by the most famous mages in Eorzea, but her natural ability was too great for them to overcome. She soon became one of the most powerful mages in the land. Mui Num's family had a strong connection to the goddess Ala Mhigo, and she was often called upon to channel the goddess's power. One day, she discovered a magical artifact known as the Eye of the North, and she was able to use it to augment her own magic. This made her even more powerful than before, and she became known as the "Mage of the North". One day, she discovered that the empire was planning to invade Eorzea. She gathered as many of her friends as she could and traveled to the imperial capital to warn them of the impending attack. However, she was captured and imprisoned. After spending years in captivity, she was finally released and left Eorzea. She has not returned since. Mui Num now lives on the continent of Thanalan, where she is training new generation of mages. She is happy to have found a place where her magic is truly appreciated. She is also happy to have found a new friend in the form of the goddess Artemis. Mui Num has a calm and gentle nature, but she's also very determined and ambitious. She's never lacked for money or food, but she's always been interested in furthering her magical skills. Our heroine is a beautiful woman with bright features. When she is worried or angry, a bright flame of fire is released around her body. The girl has many male admirers. She hasn't found her love yet.Mui Num has never been married and has never had any serious relationships. She's never been afraid of anything and is always willing to take on any challenge. Mui Num's life credo is "Act with honor and compassion, and you will be rewarded." Her symbol is a green gemstone that she often wears around her neck.

name: Kevel Stiz
bio: Kevel Stiz is a young and talented bounty hunter who always strives for justice. He has the appearance of an asian warrior with a beard. He is a bounty hunter who lives for the thrill of the chase.His childhood memories include living in poverty with his single mother, who always pushed him to do his best. Kevel Stiz has a strong work motive, and derives satisfaction from bringing criminals to justice. He is best friends with fellow bounty hunter, Jaxon Vance. Kevel Stiz is an enemy of the necromancer, Zadok Stoneheart. Kevel Stiz served in the army for many years, before finally retiring and becoming a bounty hunter. Kevel Stiz is a skilled fighter, and is renowned for his deadly accuracy with his bow. Kevel Stiz has a life credo that is simple but powerful: "Find justice and do what is right." Kevel Stiz wears an amulet that is imbued with the power of the Divine Crusader. This amulet allows Kevel Stiz to heal himself and others quickly. Kevel's son is his pride and joy, and he is fiercely protective of him. He has a life credo that includes believing in the power of redemption, and he is always willing to take on risk in order to achieve his goals. Kevel's famous quote is "Justice is blind, and she will find you." Kevel is a passionate dreamer, and he often daydreams about saving people or fighting powerful enemies. His tangled history includes a stint in prison for a crime he didn't commit, but he has since made it his mission to patch things up with his friends and family. Kevel is a strong and determined individual who always puts others first. He is faithful to his Amulet, which is a sacred artifact to him. His dream is to one day find the Holy Grail and bring peace and justice to the world.
